message:
refactor(sessions): deduplicate session file helpers into session_index

session_picker contained duplicate implementations of build_meta_from_file,
build_meta_from_jsonl, build_meta_from_sqlite, and is_session_file_path
that were identical to the canonical versions in session_index. This
duplication meant bug fixes had to be applied in two places and could
easily drift.

Changes:
- session_index: make is_session_file_path and build_meta_from_file
  pub(crate) so they can be imported by other modules
- session_picker: remove all duplicated implementations (~110 lines),
  import from session_index instead; update tests to reference the
  canonical build_meta_from_file
- session: remove local is_session_file_path, import from session_index

Test renames reflect the canonical function names:
  build_meta_from_jsonl_* → build_meta_from_file_*
  build_meta_from_sqlite_* → build_meta_from_file_*

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
